message:
🐛 fix: allow pipeline cards to query any GitHub repo (#8563)

ghpIsAllowedRepo() rejected repos not in the preconfigured
PIPELINE_REPOS list. Users who selected a different repo in the card
dropdown got 'unknown repo' and saw kubestellar/console data instead.

Fix: accept any valid owner/repo slug — the GitHub token's permissions
are the real access control. The preconfigured list only controls
which repos are fetched by DEFAULT (no filter).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
